mapper.select: select * from shop_products where shop_id = #{shopId} and enabled = true order by id desc
select * from shop_products where (#{shopId} is null or shop_id = #{shopId}) and (#{keyword} is null or #{keyword} = '' or lower(name) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))) order by id desc
mapper.update: update shop_products set stock = stock - 1 where id = #{productId} and enabled = true and stock > 0
update shop_products set stock = stock + #{delta} where id = #{productId}
